session.user:
Run the following command and report results. Do NOT fix anything, just report:
``` cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && uv run pytest tests/tui/ tests/erk_shared/gateway/plan_data_provider/ -x -q 2>&1 | tail -10 ```
Report whether all tests passed, the total count, or list any failures.
session.assistant: I'll run the command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on TUI and plan_data_provider tests, show last 10 lines

session.tool_result:
At index 0 diff: 'erk-learn' != 'erk-plan' Right contains one more item: 'erk-learn'
Full diff: ( - 'erk-plan', 'erk-learn', ) !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! stopping after 1 failures !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
session.assistant:
pytest failed: 1 issue found
The tests in `tests/tui/` and `tests/erk_shared/gateway/plan_data_provider/` failed with the `-x` flag stopping at the first failure.
**Failure Summary:** - At index 0, there's a diff mismatch: expected `'erk-plan'` but got `'erk-learn'` - The right side contains one more item: `'erk-learn'` - Assertion shows the tuple differs: `('erk-plan',)` vs `('erk-learn',)`
The test stopped immediately on this first failure. To see the specific test file and line number, the full pytest output would be needed, but the truncated tail shows only the assertion failure details.
